title: The Souler Opposite
review_summary: The reviewer praises this original comedic love story for its perfect timing, heartfelt themes of perseverance through adversity, standout performances (particularly Chris Meloni), brilliant writing, but hopes to see similar works by all contributors again.

title: Reckless
review_summary: The reviewer enjoyed this mini-series about young love across its three parts on Netflix despite some clichés; they praised Robson Greene's performance as passionate yet realistic while suggesting the series could have been tighter with just two episodes but found it watchable.
